creator: christop@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
roberto@FreeBSD.org schrieb:
> Synopsis: devel/Mercurial with false file modes
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: roberto
> State-Changed-When: Tue Aug 5 09:58:09 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Please check the value of umask set in your root shell, it should not be 077 or 007 when you
> install software, only 002 or 022 is really reasonnable.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=126254

Autsch, i was not aware somebody edited this setting in /etc/login.conf.
Changed it and everything worked as expected. Thanks for your fast reponse.

MfG
	Christoph
